title: Kirby Mod Remorphed
description: A remade version of my, "Kirby's Minecraft Dreamland" mod.
body:
Kirby is owned by HAL Laboratories and Nintendo I don't take the credit for Kirby.
SO GO GET THEIR GAMES!
![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0677d4f237b459a33b059309c43196518abafe0a.png) ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3508af9c2931f09b877bc8480980f43bf1cd931.png) ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea09930a9434d381deeb42c779d118b589c50851.png) ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c2a65d41f68c1d53493a0a6d4f829bd5ae5fbe.png) ![Decription](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ae015bb2db450b732cc67d13586d508665ac93.png)
This mod just adds abunch of kirby things to minecraft for peak FUN. It will be adding abunch of mobs, items and FOOD. This mod is a remake of my other kirby mod (Kirby's MC Dreamland), but this time I will be redoing all the things in the last mod, so this mod will be better.
![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283cdbd046b5b2407afcfc0724c7ac273f799350.png)

REQUIREMENTS



GeckoLib * required

PlayerAnimator * required

BetterCombat * optional

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cad6949c93b62772327ce36d34d69330c872773.png)

Features

This mod add a lot of things such as
Mobs - Kirby - And more in the future
Abilitys - Beam ability - Fighter ability - Microphone ability - Jet ability - Cupid ability
Structures - Structures will be added in the full release
and much more! ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283cdbd046b5b2407afcfc0724c7ac273f799350.png)

CREDITS

All music tracks and sound effects are by HAL and Nintendo.
and if you ever make a video on this mod then please credit it in the description of your video.
![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a89c00d3ab3341b563ed318fd6ad4e71d8cd044.png)
